turnaround.front_view: Symmetrical face, both eyes visible, small smile centred
turnaround.3_4_view: Primary/default angle, slight tilt, one eye slightly larger
turnaround.side_view: One eye visible, smooth head curve, minimal depth
turnaround.back_view: Simplified dorsal fin and tail silhouette, no facial features

core_poses.name: Idle / Default
core_poses.description: Floating slightly angled (3/4), eyes open, soft smile

core_poses.name: Curious
core_poses.description: Leaning forward slightly, eyes widened, tiny mouth

core_poses.name: Happy
core_poses.description: Open smiling mouth, bright eyes, slight fin lift

core_poses.name: Excited
core_poses.description: Bouncing pose, fins raised, wide open eyes

core_poses.name: Sleeping
core_poses.description: Eyes closed, relaxed mouth, slightly tilted body

core_poses.name: Thinking
core_poses.description: Eyes looking slightly up/side, subtle frown curve

core_poses.name: Concerned
core_poses.description: Slightly lowered eyelids, small flat mouth

core_poses.name: Determined
core_poses.description: Eyes focused forward, slight tilt down

body_language.rule: Small shifts convey emotion without complexity

consistency_rules: Eyes must remain large and expressive
Keep colour palette within defined blues
Expressions should be readable at small sizes
